title: onobrychis dasycephala
intro: Onobrychis dasycephala, also known as dyer's knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onobrychis dasycephala include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
